heading: Scholarship
label: 7673 Scholarship

children.heading: .—Scholarship
children.label: a .—Scholarship
children.text: A scholarship provided to a participant in the Program for a school year shall consist of payment of the tuition (or such portion of the tuition as may be provided under subsection (b)) of the participant for that school year and payment of other reasonable educational expenses (including fees, books, and laboratory expenses) for that school year.
in the case of a participant in the Program who is a full-time student, may not exceed $10,000 for the equivalent of one year of full-time coursework; and

in the case of a participant in the Program who is a part-time student, shall bear the same ratio to the amount that would be paid under paragraph (1) if the participant were a full-time student in the course of education or training being pursued by the participant as the coursework carried by the participant to full-time coursework in that course of education or training.
The maximum number of school years for which a scholarship may be paid under subsection (a) to a participant in the Program shall be six school years.
A participant in the Program may not receive a scholarship under subsection (a) for more than the equivalent of three years of full-time coursework.

children.heading: .—Payment of Educational Expenses by Educational Institutions
children.label: d .—Payment of Educational Expenses by Educational Institutions
children.text: The Secretary may arrange with an educational institution in which a participant in the Program is enrolled for the payment of the educational expenses described in subsection (a). Such payments may be made without regard to subsections (a) and (b) of .section 3324 of title 31
In the case of undergraduate coursework, 30 semester hours per undergraduate school year.
In the case of graduate coursework, 18 semester hours per graduate school year.
